steps.title: Substitute x = 8 into the function
steps.content:
We are given $f(x) = 100x + 4$. To find $f(8)$, substitute $x = 8$:
$$f(8) = 100(8) + 4$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Multiply first, then add:
$$100 \cdot 8 = 800$$
$$800 + 4 = 804$$
That matches Choice D — $804$.
